new_public_api: func (t *Tree) Insert(path string, fileID uint64) error
unchanged_public_api: func Insert(store *NodeStore, alloc *NodeAllocator, rootNodeID uint64, path string, fileID uint64) (uint64, error) -- kept byte-for-byte, all existing single-threaded tests depend on it
risk_areas: Deadlock: must maintain strict root-to-leaf lock ordering everywhere, including the rare re-locate-parent path, to avoid any leaf-to-root ordering that could cycle with a concurrent op going root-to-leaf.

Concurrent root promotion race: two inserts both propagating a split to what they each believe is 'the root' -- handled by re-checking Tree.root under rootMu immediately before allocating a new root, and falling back to a fresh key-routed parent search (findParent) if the check fails.

Concurrent shared-parent split race: two inserts both needing to update the SAME ancestor concurrently, where one may have already split it out from under the other -- handled by retrying (fresh findParent) if indexOfChild fails after acquiring the parent's latch.

No writer ever holds > 2 node latches at once: enforced by construction (window-of-2 during descent, single-latch-at-a-time during propagation, plus the temporarily-locked new sibling during a split write, which is a brand-new never-yet-contended node ID).
regression_surface: All existing engine/btree/... tests (Insert, Lookup, Delete, Scan, Node encode/decode) must remain green -- Tree is additive only, no existing signatures changed.
